name: Agnes Built-in
description: First-party guidance that ships with every Agnes instance — how to use Agnes as an analyst and how to configure it as an operator. Maintained by Agnes; served to all users, RBAC-scoped per plugin.

plugins.name: agnes-analyst
plugins.description: Analyst rails for working with Agnes data. Covers: discovering tables (catalog / schema / describe), choosing the right query path for local vs remote (BigQuery) data, taking estimate-first filtered snapshots of large remote tables, the per-source SQL flavour (DuckDB vs BigQuery), and looking up canonical business-metric definitions before computing them. Served to everyone.

plugins.name: agnes-operator
plugins.description: Operator guide for configuring this Agnes instance. Covers the three customization layers — the init prompt + analyst workspace (Initial Workspace Template), branding / instance.yaml (with the env > yaml > default resolution and its footgun), and connectors — and reads the instance's live config surface so the guidance names this deployment's real pointers instead of hardcoding them. Served to admins.
